Altered is a *2-player trading card game.* Each player will play a deck led by a *Hero* card.

Altered is an innovative TCG which offers a new, refreshing approach to both competitive and casual players. Set in a universe of rich lore and visual design (influenced by Miyazaki's work and Dixit-like illustrations), this game is about exploring a new, reshaped Earth after a mysterious event, the Confluence, profoundly altered it.
Alternatively, click on "Companion side" at the top.

es_ES: Siempre con hambre de nuevas ideas...

str_to_translate: An energy system is a piece of subtle machinery to be optimized for better output.
fr_FR: Tout système énergétique est une machinerie subtile, à optimiser pour en tirer le meilleur rendement.
es_ES: Todo sistema de energía es una pieza de delicada maquinaria por optimizar.
it_IT: Un sistema energetico è un raffinato meccanismo da ottimizzare per migliorarne il risultato.
de_DE: Ein Energiesystem ist ein Teil einer raffinierten Maschinerie, die für Höchstleistungen optimiert werden muss.

str_to_translate: Anchor and boost your allies over the long haul and reap the rewards of your good deeds.
Anchored: during Rest, I don't go to Reserve and I lose Anchored.
And that's it for the morning!
Are you ready to discover what lies beyond the gates?
As in many games, the bottom of the card has a text area for the card's *special ability.* This one is marked with a "-->," indicating that it activates whenever it is played.
As you can see, a *Fleeting token* was added to Alice, even though she doesn't have a Fleeting label in her description.
As you can see, each player's [red]*Mana Pool*[/red] has already been refreshed!
As you can see, it only consumed 1 mana instead of 2, thanks to our Studious Disciple's Support ability!
As you can see, they start at opposite ends of the arena at the beginning of the game!
As you can see, this card costs 3 Mana, and our opponent's [red]*Mana Pool*[/red] has been completely drained as a result.
At *Dusk,* for each region type in a Hero's or Companion's current location, each expedition's skill in that region will be compared against that of their opponent's expedition.
At Dusk, Hero and Companion expedition totals are *combined.* [green]Whoever wins more region types wins the game![/green]
At Noon — Target Expedition moves forward one region.
fr_FR: À Midi — L'Expédition ciblée avance d'une région.
es_ES: Al mediodía — Una expedición objetivo avanza una región.
it_IT: A mezzogiorno — Una spedizione bersaglio avanza di una regione.
de_DE: Zum Mittag — Eine Expedition deiner Wahl bewegt sich eine Region vorwärts.

str_to_translate: At Noon, if you control a Bureaucrat — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token in target Expedition.  When you play a Bureaucrat — You may have it gain <ASLEEP>. (During Dusk, ignore its statistics. During Rest, it doesn't go to Reserve and it loses Asleep.)
At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token in #each of your Expeditions#.
fr_FR: À Midi — Créez un jeton Soldat <ORDIS_RECRUIT> dans #chacune de vos Expéditions#.
es_ES: Al mediodía — Crea una ficha de soldado <ORDIS_RECRUIT> en #cada una de tus expediciones#.
it_IT: A mezzogiorno — Crea una pedina Soldato <ORDIS_RECRUIT> in #ciascuna delle tue spedizioni#.
de_DE: Zum Mittag — Erschaffe eine <ORDIS_RECRUIT>-Soldatenmarke in #jeder deiner Expeditionen#.

str_to_translate: At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token in your Companion Expedition.
fr_FR: À Midi — Créez un jeton Soldat <ORDIS_RECRUIT> dans votre Expédition Compagnon.
es_ES: Al mediodía — Crea una ficha de soldado <ORDIS_RECRUIT> en tu expedición del compañero.
it_IT: A mezzogiorno — Crea una pedina Soldato <ORDIS_RECRUIT> nella spedizione del tuo compagno.
de_DE: Zum Mittag — Erschaffe eine <ORDIS_RECRUIT>-Soldatenmarke in deiner Gefährten-Expedition.

str_to_translate: At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token in your Hero Expedition.
fr_FR: À Midi — Créez un jeton Soldat <ORDIS_RECRUIT> dans votre Expédition Héros.
es_ES: Al mediodía — Crea una ficha de soldado <ORDIS_RECRUIT> en tu expedición del héroe.
it_IT: A mezzogiorno — Crea una pedina Soldato <ORDIS_RECRUIT> nella tua spedizione dell'eroe.
de_DE: Zum Mittag — Erschaffe eine <ORDIS_RECRUIT>-Soldatenmarke in deiner Helden-Expedition.

str_to_translate: At Noon — You may pay {1} and put a card from your hand in Reserve to create a <BRASSBUG> Robot token in target Expedition.
fr_FR: À Midi — Vous pouvez payer {1} et mettre une carte de votre main en Réserve pour créer un jeton Robot <BRASSBUG> dans l'Expédition ciblée.
es_ES: Al mediodía — Puedes pagar {1} y colocar una carta de tu mano en la reserva para crear una ficha de robot <BRASSBUG> en una expedición objetivo.
it_IT: A mezzogiorno — Puoi pagare {1} e mettere una carta dalla tua mano nella Riserva per creare una pedina Robot <BRASSBUG> in una spedizione bersaglio.
de_DE: Zum Mittag — Du darfst {1} bezahlen und eine Karte aus deiner Hand in die Reserve legen, um eine <BRASSBUG>-Robotermarke in einer Expedition deiner Wahl zu erschaffen.

str_to_translate: At Noon — if you are the first player, create a <BOODA> Companion token in your Companion Expedition.
At the top, you should see two familiar options - Hero side and Companion side.
BGA has six different *starter decks* you can try out, each featuring cards from a different faction.
Be careful what you wish for. There are challenges that even the Bravos prefer to avoid.
fr_FR: Attention à ce que tu souhaites. Il est des dangers que même les Bravos préfèrent éviter.
es_ES: Ten cuidado con lo que deseas. Hay desafíos que incluso en Bravos prefieren evitar.
it_IT: Bisogna stare attenti a ciò che si desidera. Ci sono sfide che persino i Bravos preferiscono evitare.
de_DE: Bedenke gut, was du dir wünschst. Es gibt Herausforderungen, die selbst die Bravos lieber vermeiden.

str_to_translate: Because of her artificial nature, she served as a model for the Faction's first Automata prototypes.
fr_FR: Par sa nature artificielle, elle a servi de modèle pour les premiers prototypes d'automates de la Faction.
es_ES: Debido a su naturaleza artificial, sirvió de modelo para los primeros prototipos de autómata de Axiom.
it_IT: Per via della sua natura artificiale, funse da modella per i primi prototipi di automi della fazione.
de_DE: Aufgrund ihrer künstlichen Natur diente sie als Modell für die ersten Automata-Prototypen der Fraktion.

str_to_translate: Behind every Axiom masterwork, there are Foundry Engineers.
fr_FR: Derrière chaque chef-d'œuvre Axiom, il y a des ingénieurs de la Fonderie.
es_ES: Detrás de cada obra maestra de Axiom, hay un ingeniero de la Fundición.
it_IT: Dietro ogni capolavoro degli Axiom ci sono gli ingegneri della Fonderia.

str_to_translate: Big thank yous go out to *Tisaac* and *vincentt* for bringing this game to BGA!
Boney Legs, she's called, and her hut is one reason why.
fr_FR: Vous préférez les ailes ou la cuisse ?
es_ES: Hay quienes la llaman «patapollo», en parte por su choza.
it_IT: La chiamano Gamba d'osso e il suo rifugio è una delle ragioni.
de_DE: Knochenbein wird sie genannt, und ihre Hütte ist einer der Gründe dafür.

str_to_translate: Born and led from the mind of talented game designer Régis Bonnessée (founder of the Libellud studio, which published Dixit, Mysterium, Dice Forge, and Seasons), this project is brought to you by the French studio Equinox, based in Paris, in partnership with and exclusively distributed by Asmodee.
Bureaucracy is an art that requires careful planning.
fr_FR: La bureaucratie est un art qui exige une grande planification.
es_ES: La burocracia es un arte que requiere una meticulosa planificación.
it_IT: La burocrazia è un'arte che richiede un'attenta pianificazione.
de_DE: Bürokratie ist eine Kunst, die sorgfältige Planung erfordert.

str_to_translate: Cards in Reserve can be played into expeditions again.
Cards with Fleeting gain a *Fleeting token* when played, which you can now see in the top-right corner of the card.
Cards your opponents play cost {1} more.
Centuries ago, life on Earth changed forever: a cataclysm brought beings from the world of stories and dreams to our reality.
Chaos can bring disappointment, sure, but it's also where ye'll find the most wonderfullest hidden gems!
fr_FR: Le chaos est source de désillusions, mais recèle aussi les plus belles pépites !
es_ES: Sí, el caos puede ser una lata, ¡pero también contiene las gemas ocultas más maravillásticas!
it_IT: Il caos può portare delusione, certo, ma è lì che troverai le gemme nascoste più spettacolose!
de_DE: Chaos kann Enttäuschungen mit sich bringen, aber es ist auch der Ort, an dem man die wunderbarsten Schätze entdeckt!

fr_FR: Les Personnages que vous contrôlez gagnent 1 boost.
es_ES: Los personajes que controles ganan 1 potenciador.
it_IT: I personaggi che controlli ottengono 1 rinforzo.
de_DE: Charaktere, die du kontrollierst, erhalten 1 Verstärkung.

fr_FR: Les Personnages que vous contrôlez ont $<TOUGH_2>.

str_to_translate: Characters you control have $<TOUGH_2>.  #At Noon — Target Character you control gains 1 boost.#
fr_FR: Les Personnages que vous contrôlez ont $<TOUGH_2>.  #À Midi — Un Personnage ciblé que vous contrôlez gagne 1 boost.#
es_ES: Los personajes que controles tienen $<TOUGH_2>.  #Al mediodía — Un personaje objetivo que controles gana 1 potenciador.#
it_IT: I personaggi che controlli hanno $<TOUGH_2>.  #A mezzogiorno — Un personaggio bersaglio che controlli ottiene 1 rinforzo.#
de_DE: Charaktere, die du kontrollierst, haben $<TOUGH_2>.  #Zum Mittag — Ein Charakter deiner Wahl, den du kontrollierst, erhält 1 Verstärkung.#

str_to_translate: Characters you control have $<TOUGH_2>. (Cards in Reserve are not controlled.)
fr_FR: Les Personnages que vous contrôlez ont $<TOUGH_2>. (Les cartes en Réserve ne sont pas contrôlées.)
es_ES: Los personajes que controles tienen $<TOUGH_2>. (Las cartas de la reserva no las controla nadie.)
it_IT: I personaggi che controlli hanno $<TOUGH_2>. (Le carte nella Riserva non sono controllate.)
de_DE: Charaktere, die du kontrollierst, haben $<TOUGH_2>. (Karten in der Reserve werden nicht kontrolliert.)

str_to_translate: Characters you control other than me have <TOUGH_1>.
Characters you control other than me have <TOUGH_2>.
Characters your opponents play cost {1} more.
fr_FR: Les Personnages joués par vos adversaires coûtent {1} de plus.
es_ES: Los personajes que jueguen tus oponentes cuestan {1} más.
it_IT: I personaggi giocati dai tuoi avversari costano {1} in più.
de_DE: Charaktere, die deine Gegner spielen, kosten {1} mehr.

str_to_translate: Check if there are less than 4 <BOOST>
Choose one:  • Send to Reserve target Character with Hand Cost {4} or more.  • Discard target Permanent with Hand Cost {4} or more.
fr_FR: Choisissez l'un :  • Envoyez en Réserve un Personnage ciblé avec un Coût de Main {4} ou plus.  • Défaussez un Permanent ciblé avec un Coût de Main {4} ou plus.
es_ES: Elige una opción:  • Envía a la reserva un personaje objetivo con coste desde la mano de {4} o más.  • Descarta un permanente objetivo con coste desde la mano de {4} o más.
it_IT: Scegli uno:  • Manda un personaggio bersaglio con costo dalla mano pari o superiore a {4} nella Riserva.  • Scarta un permanente bersaglio con costo dalla mano pari o superiore a {4}.
de_DE: Wähle eine Aktion:  • Schicke einen Charakter deiner Wahl mit Handkosten {4} oder mehr in die Reserve.  • Lege eine bleibende Karte deiner Wahl mit Handkosten {4} oder mehr ab.

str_to_translate: Click on *Dorothy Gale* (far left), *Yzmir Stargazer* (3rd from the left), and *Alice* (far right) in that exact order.
Compare statistics and check which expeditions move forward
Computing the progress in the Tumult
Confirm discard to increase die by 2
Construct powerful machines and let their strength carry you to victory!
Create #a <BRASSBUG> Robot# token in each of your Expeditions.
fr_FR: Créez #un jeton Robot <BRASSBUG># dans chacune de vos Expéditions.
es_ES: Crea #una ficha de robot <BRASSBUG># en cada una de tus expediciones.
it_IT: Crea #una pedina Robot <BRASSBUG># in ciascuna delle tue spedizioni.

str_to_translate: Create #four# <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier tokens, #distributed as you choose among any number of target Expeditions#.
fr_FR: Créez #quatre# jetons Soldat <ORDIS_RECRUIT>, #distribués comme vous le souhaitez dans n'importe quel nombre d'Expéditions ciblées#.
es_ES: Crea #cuatro# fichas de soldado <ORDIS_RECRUIT>, #distribuidas como elijas entre cualquier número de expediciones objetivo#.
it_IT: Crea #quattro# pedine Soldato <ORDIS_RECRUIT> #distribuite a tua scelta tra un numero qualsiasi di spedizioni bersaglio#.
de_DE: Erschaffe #vier# <ORDIS_RECRUIT>-Soldatenmarken und #verteile sie nach Belieben auf Expeditionen deiner Wahl.#

str_to_translate: Create a <BRASSBUG> Robot token in each of your Expeditions.
Create a <BRASSBUG> Robot token in target Expedition.
Create a <BRASSBUG> Robot token in target Expedition. (BR)
Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token in each of your Expeditions.
Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token in my Expedition.
Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token in target Expedition.
Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token in your Companion Expedition.
Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token in your Hero Expedition.
Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token in your other Expedition (the one I'm not in).
Create four <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier tokens, distributed as you choose among any number of target Expeditions.
Create two <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier tokens in each of your Expeditions.
fr_FR: Créez deux jetons Soldat <ORDIS_RECRUIT> dans chacune de vos Expéditions.
es_ES: Crea dos fichas de soldado <ORDIS_RECRUIT> en cada una de tus expediciones.
it_IT: Crea due pedine Soldato <ORDIS_RECRUIT> in ciascuna delle tue spedizioni.
de_DE: Erschaffe zwei <ORDIS_RECRUIT>-Soldatenmarken in jeder deiner Expeditionen.

str_to_translate: Create two <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier tokens in my Expedition.
Dance is the language of the soul.
fr_FR: La danse est le langage de l'âme.
es_ES: El baile es la lengua del alma.
it_IT: La danza è il linguaggio dell'anima.
de_DE: Tanz ist die Sprache der Seele.

fr_FR: Défaussez un Personnage ou Permanent ciblé.
es_ES: Descarta un personaje o permanente objetivo.
it_IT: Scarta un personaggio o un permanente bersaglio.
de_DE: Lege einen Charakter deiner Wahl oder eine bleibende Karte ab.

str_to_translate: Discard up to one target card from a Reserve.
fr_FR: Défaussez jusqu'à une carte d'une Réserve.
es_ES: Descarta hasta una carta objetivo de una reserva.
it_IT: Scarta fino a una carta bersaglio da una Riserva.
de_DE: Lege bis zu eine Karte deiner Wahl aus einer Reserve ab.

str_to_translate: Display some settings about the game.
Don't think you are, know you are.
fr_FR: Ne pense pas que tu es, sache que tu es.
es_ES: No basta con creer que eres lo que eres, debes saber que lo eres.
it_IT: Non pensare di essere, sappi di essere.
de_DE: Du musst nicht glauben, dass du existierst. Du musst es wissen.

str_to_translate: Don't worry, we'll go through them all step by step as we get to them!
Draw and keep card or play it for free
During Dusk, ignore my statistics. During Rest, I don't go to Reserve and I lose Asleep.
fr_FR: Au Crépuscule, ignorez mes statistiques. Au Repos, je ne vais pas en Réserve et je perds Endormi.
es_ES: Durante el anochecer, ignora mis estadísticas. Durante el descanso, no voy a la reserva y pierdo sueño.
it_IT: Durante il crepuscolo, ignora le mie statistiche. Durante il riposo, non vado nella Riserva e perdo Dormiente.
de_DE: Am Abend ignoriere meine Statistiken. Während der Ruhepause gehe ich nicht in die Reserve und verliere Schlafend.

str_to_translate: During Morning, draw only one card. Then, put the top card of your deck in your Mana zone instead of a card from your hand.  At Noon — $<RESUPPLY>.  Ignore my abilities during the first Day.
fr_FR: Le Matin, piochez une seule carte. Puis, mettez la première carte de votre deck dans votre zone de Mana, au lieu d'une carte de votre main.  À Midi — $<RESUPPLY>.  Ignorez mes capacités le premier Jour.
es_ES: Durante la mañana, roba una sola carta. Luego, coloca la primera carta de tu mazo en tu zona de maná en lugar de una carta de tu mano.  Al mediodía — $<RESUPPLY>.  Ignora mis habilidades durante el primer día.
it_IT: Durante la mattina, pesca solo una carta. Poi metti la prima carta del tuo mazzo nella tua area del mana invece di una carta dalla tua mano.  A mezzogiorno — $<RESUPPLY>.  Ignora le mie abilità durante la prima giornata.
de_DE: Am Morgen ziehe nur eine Karte. Dann lege statt einer Karte aus deiner Hand die oberste Karte deines Decks in deine Manazone.  Zum Mittag — $<RESUPPLY>.  Ignoriere meine Fähigkeiten während des ersten Tages.

str_to_translate: During Rest, I don't go to Reserve and I lose Anchored.
fr_FR: Au Repos, je ne vais pas en Réserve et je perds Ancré.
es_ES: Durante el descanso, no voy a la reserva y pierdo anclaje.
it_IT: Durante il riposo, non vado nella Riserva e perdo Ancorato.
de_DE: Während der Ruhepause gehe ich nicht in die Reserve und verliere Verankert.

str_to_translate: During Rest, I don't go to Reserve.
fr_FR: Au Repos, je ne vais pas en Réserve.
es_ES: Durante el descanso, no voy a la reserva.
it_IT: Durante il riposo, non vado nella Riserva.
de_DE: Während der Ruhepause gehe ich nicht in die Reserve.

str_to_translate: Each Character controlled by target player gains <FLEETING>.
Each card will help their *hero* and *companion* move toward each other while preventing the opponent's tokens doing the same.
Each of these areas has a different set of regions.
Each player discards their hand and their Reserve, then draws three cards.
Each player discards their hand, then draws three cards.
Each player gets two tokens to indicate their [red]*Hero's*[/red] and [blue]*Companion's*[/blue]  locations.
Each player now has the option to *discard* one card to increase their [red]*Mana Pool*[/red] by 1!
Each player puts the top card of their deck in their Mana zone (as an exhausted Mana Orb).
Effects are not triggered, due to an effect in the opponent's expedition
Eidolon or human, we are all shaped by stories. They're the building blocks of our identity.
Eidolon or not, you are our Shepherdess. You lead and we follow.
fr_FR: "Eidolon ou non, tu es notre Bergère. Tu guides, et nous suivons."
es_ES: «Eidolón o no, eres nuestra pastora. Tú lideras, nosotros te seguimos».
it_IT: Eidolon o no, sei la nostra guida. Tu vai avanti, noi ti seguiamo.
de_DE: "Ob Eidolon oder nicht, du bist unsere Hirtin. Du führst und wir folgen."

str_to_translate: Embedded in the cliff wall, it overlooks the city and reminds everyone who looks up at it that nothing is unreachable if you put your mind to it.
fr_FR: Enchâssée dans la falaise, elle surplombe la ville, rappelant à tous ceux qui lèvent les yeux que rien n'est inaccessible si l'on s'en donne la peine.
es_ES: Incrustada en la pared de un acantilado, se alza sobre la ciudad y recuerda a todos los que la admiran que nada es inalcanzable si pones todo tu empeño.
it_IT: Incastonata in una parete rocciosa, si affaccia sulla città e ricorda a chiunque la osservi che impegnandosi nulla è inarrivabile.
de_DE: Eingebettet in die Felswand überblickt sie die Stadt und erinnert alle, die zu ihr hinaufschauen: Wo ein Wille ist, ist auch ein Weg.

str_to_translate: End your turn as if you had played a card. You may still play cards later this Day.
fr_FR: Terminez votre tour comme si vous aviez joué une carte. Vous pouvez encore jouer des cartes plus tard ce Jour.
es_ES: Termina tu turno como si hubieras jugado una carta. A lo largo del día actual, puedes jugar más cartas.
it_IT: Termina il tuo turno come se avessi giocato una carta. Puoi comunque giocare carte più avanti in questa giornata.
de_DE: Beende deine Runde, als ob du eine Karte gespielt hättest. Du darfst auch später an diesem Tag noch eine Karte spielen.

str_to_translate: Ever the trickster, always the rebel.
it_IT: Sempre un mistificatore, sempre un ribelle.
de_DE: Immer der Schwindler, immer der Rebell.

str_to_translate: Every challenge is a blessing that lets me rise even higher.
fr_FR: Chaque défi est une bénédiction qui me permet de me hisser vers les sommets.
es_ES: Cada desafío es una bendición que me ayuda a volar más alto.
it_IT: Ogni sfida è una benedizione che mi permette di salire ancora più in alto.
de_DE: Jede Herausforderung ist ein Segen, der mich zu noch größeren Höhen beflügelt.

str_to_translate: Everything is energy and that's all there is to it.
fr_FR: Tout est énergie, et c'est tout ce qu'il y a à comprendre.
es_ES: Todo es energía, no le des más vueltas.
it_IT: Tutto è energia, non c'è altro.
de_DE: Alles ist Energie, und mehr ist dazu nicht zu sagen.

str_to_translate: Facing terrible odds and an unfathomably huge Leviathan, the Ordis legion charged nonetheless.
fr_FR: Malgré des chances dérisoires, la légion Ordis chargea face au colossal et insondable Léviathan.
es_ES: A pesar de tener todo en su contra y hacer frente a un leviatán imposiblemente colosal, la legión de Ordis cargó.
it_IT: Nonostante il leviatano enorme e le minime probabilità di riuscita, la legione degli Ordis attaccò.
de_DE: Trotz gewaltiger zahlenmäßiger Unterlegenheit und eines unvorstellbar großen Leviathans griff die Ordis-Legion an.

str_to_translate: Faster, ever faster! Our fire rages highest when the race is afoot!
Few people visit the depths of the Foundry, and even fewer can explain how the Brassbugs came to be.
fr_FR: Rares sont ceux qui visitent les profondeurs de la Fonderie, et encore plus rares ceux qui savent expliquer d'où viennent les Scarabots.
es_ES: Pocos visitan las profundidades de la Fundición, y aún menos pueden explicar cómo fueron creados los bicholatas.
it_IT: Poche persone si addentrano nelle profondità della Fonderia e ancora meno riescono a spiegare l'origine delle ottonblatte.
de_DE: Nur wenige Menschen besuchen die Tiefen der Gießerei, und noch weniger können erklären, wie die Blechkäfer entstanden sind.

str_to_translate: Flames fly from his hand as he falls towards the monster, leaving a trail of glowing fire behind him...
fr_FR: Des flammes jaillissent de sa main alors qu’il chute en direction du monstre, laissant derrière lui une traînée incandescente…
es_ES: Sus manos expulsan llamas mientras cae sobre el monstruo, dejando tras de sí un rastro de fuego refulgente...
it_IT: Le fiamme volano dalla sua mano mentre scende verso il mostro, lasciandosi dietro una scia di fuoco incandescente...
de_DE: Flammen sprühen aus seiner Hand, während er auf das Monster zustürzt und eine Spur aus glühendem Feuer hinter sich herzieht …

str_to_translate: Fleeting: if I would be send to reserve, banish me instead.
Follow me, friends! If we stand together, nothing can stop us!
For each Character you control other than me, you may activate its {j} triggers.
For each Permanent you control, you may activate its {j} triggers.
For example, the *Yzmir Stargazer* cost *2* mana when we played her from our hand.
For hundreds of years, Kaibara has protected Asagartha.
fr_FR: Depuis de nombreux siècles, Kaibara veille sur Asgartha.
es_ES: Desde hace siglos, Kaibara ha protegido Asgartha.
it_IT: Per centinaia di anni Kaibara ha protetto Asgartha.
de_DE: Seit Jahrhunderten hat Kaibara Asgartha beschützt.

str_to_translate: For only the most gifted of Alterers could bring humanity's long-remembered legends to life.
fr_FR: Seuls les Altérateurs et Altératrices les plus doués peuvent donner vie aux légendes gravées dans la mémoire de l'humanité.
es_ES: Pues tan solo los más prodigiosos de los Alteradores serían capaces de hacer que las leyendas más recordadas de la humanidad cobrasen vida.
it_IT: Giacché solo i più talentuosi degli alterer potevano dare vita alle leggende a lungo narrate dall'umanità.
de_DE: Nur die begabtesten Alterer können die längst vergessenen Legenden der Menschheit zum Leben erwecken.

str_to_translate: For the first time in centuries, the Solstice Gate has opened. For the first time in ages, humanity will discover what lies beyond the gates.
fr_FR: La Porte du Solstice est ouverte. Pour la première fois depuis des temps immémoriaux, l'humanité va découvrir ce qui se trouve au-delà des portes.
es_ES: Por primera vez en siglos, el Portal del solsticio se ha abierto. Por primera vez en eras, la humanidad descubrirá lo que hay más allá de las puertas.
it_IT: Per la prima volta dopo secoli, il Portale del Solstizio è stato aperto. Per la prima volta dopo anni, l'umanità scoprirà cosa si nasconde al di là dei cancelli.
de_DE: Zum ersten Mal seit Jahrhunderten hat sich das Tor der Sonnenwende geöffnet. Zum ersten Mal seit Jahrhunderten wird die Menschheit entdecken, was hinter diesem Tor liegt.

fr_FR: C'est ce qu'on appelle se faire mettre le grappin dessus.

str_to_translate: Go back and forth taking turns

fr_FR: "Ça va aller. Je touche du bois."

str_to_translate: Harmony may bloom from a single act of kindness, as a rice field may sprout from a single grain of rice.
Haven isn't where legends are born... it's where they live forever.
fr_FR: Havre n'est pas le lieu où naissent les légendes. C'est le lieu où elles deviennent immortelles.
es_ES: El Refugio no es donde nacen las leyendas... es donde viven para toda la eternidad.
it_IT: Il Rifugio non è dove nascono le leggende, ma dove vivono in eterno.
de_DE: In Haven werden keine Legenden geboren: Sie leben hier, auf immer und ewig.

str_to_translate: Help or harm? Only the card will tell.
fr_FR: Faveur ou infortune ? Seul le tirage le révélera.
es_ES: ¿Te ayudará o será tu perdición? Las cartas lo dirán.
it_IT: Aiuto o danno? Solo la carta potrà dirlo.
de_DE: Schutz oder Schaden? Das kann nur die Karte zeigen.

str_to_translate: Her being begins to disintegrate as she breaks all the Mana bridges linking the idea of who she is to physical matter.
fr_FR: Son corps se met à se désagréger alors qu’elle rompt tous les ponts de Mana qui lient son essence à la matière.
es_ES: Su cuerpo empieza a desintegrarse mientras rompe todos los puentes de maná que vinculan la idea de su ser a su forma física.
it_IT: Il suo essere inizia a disintegrarsi non appena rompe tutti i ponti di mana che collegano l'idea che ha di sé con la materia fisica.
de_DE: Ihr Wesen beginnt sich aufzulösen, während sie alle Mana-Brücken hinter sich abbricht, die das Konzept des eigenen Selbst mit der physischen Materie verbinden.

str_to_translate: Her determination has yet to meet its match in this world.
fr_FR: Sa détermination est sans égale dans ce monde.
es_ES: No ha nacido aún quien la iguale en su determinación.
it_IT: La sua determinazione non è ancora stata eguagliata in questo mondo.
de_DE: Ihre Entschlossenheit ist beispiellos auf dieser Welt.

str_to_translate: Hope you're not afraid of heights!
it_IT: Spero che tu non soffra di vertigini!
de_DE: Ich hoffe, du hast keine Höhenangst!

str_to_translate: However, instead of placing a Character into an expedition, they have some other sort of effect.
I am $<DEFENDER> unless you control two or more #Bureaucrats#.
I am $<DEFENDER> unless you control two or more other Plants.
I am considered present in each of your Expeditions.
fr_FR: Je suis considéré présent dans chacune de vos Expéditions.
es_ES: Estoy presente en todas tus expediciones.
it_IT: Considerami presente in ciascuna delle tue spedizioni.
de_DE: Ich werde in jeder deiner Expeditionen als anwesend betrachtet.

str_to_translate: I begin the game with five Heroism counters.  When you play a Character with Hand Cost greater than or equal to my number of Heroism counters — Draw a card and I gain a Heroism counter.
fr_FR: Je commence la partie avec cinq compteurs Héroïsme.  Lorsque vous jouez un Personnage avec un Coût de Main supérieur ou égal à mon nombre de compteurs Héroïsme — Piochez une carte et je gagne un compteur Héroïsme.
es_ES: Comienzo la partida con cinco contadores de heroísmo.  Cuando juegues un personaje con coste desde la mano superior o igual a mi número de contadores de heroísmo — Tú robas una carta y yo gano un contador de heroísmo.
it_IT: Inizio la partita con cinque segnalini Eroismo.  Quando giochi un personaggio con costo dalla mano pari o superiore al numero dei miei segnalini Eroismo — Pesca una carta e ottengo un segnalino Eroismo.
de_DE: Ich beginne das Spiel mit fünf Heldentumszählern.  Wenn du einen Charakter spielst, dessen Handkosten größer oder gleich meiner Anzahl an Heldentumszählern sind — Ziehe eine Karte und ich erhalte einen Heldentumszähler.

str_to_translate: I can't be played if you have less than #six Mana Orbs#.
fr_FR: Je ne peux pas être jouée si vous avez moins de #six Orbes de Mana#.
es_ES: No puedes jugarme si tienes menos de #seis orbes de maná#.
it_IT: Non puoi giocarmi se hai meno di #sei sfere di mana#.
de_DE: Ich kann nicht gespielt werden, falls du #weniger als sechs# Manakugeln hast.

str_to_translate: I can't be played if you have less than seven Mana Orbs.
fr_FR: Je ne peux pas être jouée si vous avez moins de sept Orbes de Mana.
es_ES: No puedes jugarme si tienes menos de siete orbes de maná.
it_IT: Non puoi giocarmi se hai meno di sette sfere di mana.
de_DE: Ich kann nicht gespielt werden, falls du weniger als sieben Manakugeln hast.

str_to_translate: I can't be played if you have less than six Mana Orbs.
I don't know if there's a better reward than seeing something you've built come to life.
fr_FR: Existe-t-il meilleure récompense que de voir ses créations prendre vie ?
es_ES: ¿Qué mejor recompensa hay que ver cómo algo que has construido cobra vida?
it_IT: Non credo ci sia miglior ricompensa che vedere qualcosa che hai creato prendere vita.
de_DE: Ich kenne keine größere Belohnung, als mitzuerleben, wie etwas zum Leben erwacht, das man selbst erschaffen hat.

str_to_translate: I gain 1 boost for each Landmark you control.
I gain 1 boost for each card in each player's Reserve.
I gain 1 boost for each card in your Reserve.
I have <TOUGH_X>, where X is the number of regions between your Hero and Companion.
I keep my boosts when I go to Reserve.
fr_FR: Je conserve mes boosts lorsque je vais en Réserve.
es_ES: Mantengo mis potenciadores cuando voy a la reserva.
it_IT: Mantengo i miei rinforzi quando vado nella Riserva.
de_DE: Ich behalte meine Verstärkungen, wenn ich in die Reserve gehe.

str_to_translate: I think you've seen enough now.
I'll click on it for you...[/red]
I'll explain more about expeditions soon.
If I have 1 or more boosts:
If I have 2 or more boosts:
If I have 3 or more boosts:
If I would be sent to Reserve, discard me instead.
fr_FR: Si je devrais être envoyé en Réserve, défaussez-moi à la place.
es_ES: Si fuese a ir a la reserva, en vez de eso, descártame.
it_IT: Se sto per finire nella Riserva, scartami invece.
de_DE: Falls ich in die Reserve geschickt werden soll, lege mich stattdessen ab.

str_to_translate: If I would leave the Expedition zone while I'm <BOOSTED>, put me in my owner's Mana zone instead (as an exhausted Mana Orb).  {R} I gain 1 boost.
If at least *one* of the relevant totals is greater than the opponent's corresponding total, the player's token can *move.*
If both players do this on the same turn, but one player managed to move their tokens *farther than necessary* (past each other), that player will win!
If there's *still* a tie, another Tiebreaker Day begins!
If we end up with more than that, we'll have to discard the surplus cards in the *Cleanup* step.
If we had, our opponent probably would have played the trooper into their Hero Expedition, beating Alice's *3/3/4* with *4/4/4!*
If we play Alice (*3/3/4*) into our own Hero Expedition, we'll be able to move our own Hero token while blocking our opponent's!
If we played her again from our Reserve, she would cost only *1.*
If we select one of them (or click on our board), we'll put him back on the field, paying 1 mana.
If you click, you can read a short blurb about their playstyle!
If you control four or more Characters:
If you control one or more Landmarks:
If you control three or more Characters:
If you control two or more Landmarks:
If you control two or more Plants other than me:
If you control two or more [BOOSTED_CHA_P] Characters:
If you have any questions or comments about the tutorial, feel free to send *Nekonyancer* a message!
If you have less than eight Mana Orbs:
If you have three or more base statistics of 0 among Characters you control:
If you hover over them with your mouse, you can see more details.
If you take this action, you won't be able to undo past this step because you will either roll a dice, draw card(s) from the deck or the discard, or someone else is going to make a decision
If you want to experiment by building a new deck, you'll have to buy the real thing!
If you would <RESUPPLY_INF>, instead look at the top two cards of your deck. Put one in Reserve, and discard the other.
If you would roll a die, you may add 1 to its result. (Choose after you see the result.)
If you would roll one or more dice, instead roll that many dice plus one and ignore the roll of your choice.
fr_FR: Si vous deviez lancer un dé ou plus, lancez un dé supplémentaire et ignorez le résultat du dé de votre choix.
es_ES: Si fueses a tirar un dado o más, tira esa cantidad de dados más uno e ignora el dado que quieras.
it_IT: Se stai per lanciare uno o più dadi, lancia invece altrettanti dadi più uno e ignora un lancio a tua scelta.
de_DE: Falls du einen oder mehrere Würfel werfen würdest, wirf zusätzlich einen mehr und ignoriere den Wurf deiner Wahl.

str_to_translate: If your [red]*deck*[/red] runs out of cards and you need to draw more, your discard pile is shuffled to become your new deck.
Imagine if we had played our two cards into our [red]*Hero Expedition*[/red] instead.
In *Altered,* players will use mana to play cards from their hands.
In the *Rest* step, all character cards in all expeditions are sent to their players' [red]*reserves.*[/red]
In the abyssal depths, no one can hear you scream.
In the end, he had accumulated pretty well all the wisdom that was available. He put it in a gourd and made a stopper for it.
fr_FR: Finalement, quand il eut rassemblé toute la sagesse qu'il ait pu trouver, il la mit dans une calebasse et la reboucha.
es_ES: Al final, había hecho acopio de casi toda la sabiduría del mundo. La metió en una calabaza y le fabricó un corcho para taparla.
it_IT: Alla fine, era riuscito ad accumulare piuttosto bene tutta la saggezza disponibile. La mise in una zucca e ci mise un tappo.
de_DE: Letztlich hatte er so ziemlich alle Weisheit dieser Welt gesammelt. Er füllte sie in eine Kalebasse und verschloss sie.

str_to_translate: In this tutorial we'll play as *Akesha & Taru,* of the *Yzmir* faction.
In tie-breaker this power has no effect.
In true Axiom fashion, Kelon Elementals like to put everything to the taste.
fr_FR: Tout comme les ingénieurs Axiom, les Elémentaires de Kelon ont le goût de la découverte.
es_ES: Como es costumbre en Axiom, a los elementales de kelón les encanta probarlo todo, a veces literalmente.
it_IT: In perfetto stile Axiom, agli elementali di Kelon piace sperimentare con qualsiasi cosa.
de_DE: In typischer Axiom-Manier probieren Kelon-Elementare gerne alles.

str_to_translate: Instead, the anchor markers are removed.
It is now finally the time to leave the safety of our walls and explore the altered world.
It looks like we're tied in ☘️ and ⛰️, but we have the edge in 💧!
It may be a fire today — tomorrow it will be ashes.
fr_FR: Le feu qui semble éteint souvent dort sous la cendre...
es_ES: El fuego que parece extinto a menudo duerme bajo las cenizas.
it_IT: Il fuoco che sembra spento spesso dorme sotto la cenere.
de_DE: Heute mag es brennen – morgen wird es Asche sein.

str_to_translate: It's a good thing we didn't play Alice last turn!
Just like before, [green]*Sigismar's*[/green] ability will activate, giving our opponent a free 1/1/1 token.
Justice comes from a fair redistribution of wealth.
fr_FR: La justice découle d'une redistribution équitable des richesses.
es_ES: La justicia solo es posible con una redistribución justa de la riqueza.
it_IT: La giustizia deriva da una redistribuzione equa della ricchezza.
de_DE: Gerechtigkeit entsteht durch eine gerechte Umverteilung des Reichtums.

str_to_translate: Keep up to 2 cards in Reserve and 2 in Landmarks, discard the rest
Knowledge and wisdom must walk side by side.
fr_FR: Savoir et sagesse doivent avancer de concert.
es_ES: El conocimiento y la sabiduría deben ir de la mano.
it_IT: La conoscenza e la saggezza devono camminare fianco a fianco.
de_DE: Wissen und Weisheit müssen Hand in Hand gehen.

str_to_translate: Landmarks have persistent effects and never leave play unless destroyed by an effect.
Last round, our opponent went first.
Let me walk you to the door.
es_ES: Permíteme que te acompañe a la puerta.
de_DE: Ich bringe dich noch zur Tür.

str_to_translate: Let your opponent take the initiative to better thwart their plans, slowly but surely.
Let's look more closely at the Studious Disciple.
Let's start by learning more about our [red]Reserve.[/red] Our reserve functions as an *additional hand* in that we can play cards from there back onto the field.
Let's start with the *Yzmir Stargazer,* which is on the right side of our hand.
Let's take a closer look at the Companion Expedition.
Like the Bravos, Lyras are drawn to freedom and the distant horizon.
fr_FR: Tout comme les Bravos, les Lyra sont attirés par la liberté et l'horizon lointain.
es_ES: Igual que los de Bravos, los de Lyra se ven atraídos por la libertad y la búsqueda de nuevos horizontes.
it_IT: Come i Bravos, i Lyra sono attratti dalla libertà e dagli orizzonti distanti.
de_DE: Wie die Bravos zieht es auch die Lyra in die Freiheit und an ferne Horizonte.

str_to_translate: Little fella's got so mushroom in his heart.
Long story short, if we have bigger numbers than our opponent, we can move, and they can't.[/blue]

fr_FR: C'est très important de bien s'hydrater.
es_ES: Hay que hidratarse bien todos los días.

str_to_translate: My Expedition can't advance during Dusk.
fr_FR: Mon Expédition ne peut pas avancer au Crépuscule.
es_ES: Mi expedición no puede avanzar durante el anochecer.
it_IT: La mia spedizione non può avanzare durante il crepuscolo.
de_DE: Am Abend kann meine Expedition nicht vorrücken.

str_to_translate: Nature must be nurtured to fully express its generosity.
fr_FR: La nature se doit d'être nourrie pour exprimer toute sa bienveillance.
es_ES: Si quieres conocer la auténtica generosidad de la naturaleza, cuídala.
it_IT: La natura deve essere nutrita per poter esprimere appieno la sua generosità.
de_DE: Die Natur muss gehegt und gepflegt werden, damit sie ihre Großzügigkeit voll entfalten kann.

str_to_translate: Next spell played this turn will be free (${card_name}'s effect)
Next, each player will [red]*draw 2 cards*[/red] from their deck!
Next, let's resolve the spell's effect: [blue]choose a card in a Reserve to discard.[/blue]
No Brassbug would survive in the Tumult without armor.
fr_FR: Aucun Scarabot ne survivrait dans le Tumulte sans blindage.
es_ES: Ningún bicholata sobreviviría en el Tumulto sin su blindaje.
it_IT: Nessuna ottonblatta potrebbe sopravvivere al Tumulto senza armatura.
de_DE: Kein Blechkäfer würde ohne Rüstung im Tumult überleben.

str_to_translate: No mere trinket, but a fragment of purest dream.
fr_FR: Ce n'est pas un simple colifichet, mais un fragment même du rêve.
es_ES: No es una simple fruslería, es un fragmento de sueño puro.
it_IT: Non è un semplice gingillo, ma un frammento di puro sogno.
de_DE: Kein bloßes Schmuckstück, sondern ein Fragment aus reinstem Traum.

str_to_translate: No one can escape their gaze.
fr_FR: Nul ne peut échapper à son regard.
es_ES: Todos somos iguales ante la mirada penetrante de la justicia.
it_IT: Tutti sono uguali di fronte allo sguardo penetrante della giustizia.
de_DE: Vor dem alles durchdringenden Auge der Gerechtigkeit sind alle gleich.

str_to_translate: No winner is found. New tiebreaker round starts

fr_FR: Il est dans de beaux draps.
it_IT: Nessuno si aspetta... la danzatrice di tessuti!

str_to_translate: Not even the weight of the sky could make him buckle.
fr_FR: Le poids du ciel ne saurait lui faire courber l'échine.
es_ES: Ni el peso del cielo le hará doblegarse.
it_IT: Nemmeno il peso del cielo riuscirebbe a piegarlo.
de_DE: Nicht einmal das Gewicht des Himmels konnte ihn zur Unterwerfung zwingen.

str_to_translate: Note that each Tumult card is split into *two* areas.
Nothing is created, nothing is lost, everything is transformed.
fr_FR: Rien ne se perd, rien ne se crée, tout se transforme.
es_ES: Nada se pierde, nada se crea, todo se transforma.
it_IT: Nulla si crea, nulla si distrugge, tutto si trasforma.
de_DE: Nichts wird geschaffen, nichts geht verloren, alles verwandelt sich.

str_to_translate: Now BGA wants to know which expedition we want to play it into - our [red]*Hero Expedition*[/red] or [blue]*Companion Expedition.*[/blue]
Now that all the expeditions have been assessed, [blue]*our Companion*[/blue] and the opponent's [red]*Hero*[/red] will advance into the *Tumult* - the area between our tokens.
Now we're ready to start the game for real!
Okay, each player has selected their faction!
Okay, the three discarded cards were sent to our [red]*Mana Pool.*[/red]
Only a heart as light as a feather can stand up to the judgment of Anubis.
fr_FR: Seul un cœur aussi léger qu'une plume saura se mesurer au jugement d'Anubis.
es_ES: Solo un corazón más liviano que una pluma podrá superar el juicio de Anubis.
it_IT: Solo un cuore leggero come una piuma può tenere testa al giudizio di Anubi.
de_DE: Nur ein Herz, das so leicht wie eine Feder ist, kann dem Urteil von Anubis standhalten.

str_to_translate: Only in harmony can the world thrive.
fr_FR: Ce n'est que dans l'harmonie que le monde peut prospérer.
es_ES: La prosperidad del mundo depende de la armonía.
it_IT: Solo nell'armonia il mondo può prosperare.
de_DE: Die Welt kann nur in Harmonie gedeihen.

str_to_translate: Only the bravest can enter Haven.
fr_FR: Seuls les braves ont une place en Havre.
es_ES: Solo los más valientes pueden entrar en el Refugio.
it_IT: Solo i più audaci possono entrare nel Rifugio.
de_DE: Nur die Tapfersten dürfen Haven betreten.

str_to_translate: Only the worthy shall achieve true transcendence under my guidance.
fr_FR: Seuls les méritants pourront atteindre, sous ma direction, la véritable transcendance.
es_ES: Solo los dignos que me sigan alcanzarán la verdadera trascendencia.
it_IT: Solo chi ne sarà degno potrà raggiungere la vera trascendenza sotto la mia guida.
de_DE: Nur die Würdigen werden unter meiner Führung wahre Transzendenz erreichen.

str_to_translate: Our Companion is now in an area with ⛰️ and 💧.
Our Spy Craft card had another effect - moving the top card of our deck to our [red]*Reserve.*[/red] It turned out to be Alice.
Our [red]*Reserve*[/red] can only hold *2* cards at a time.
Our opponent chose to place the character in their Companion Expedition.
Our opponent is out of mana now, so we can safely play Alice, knowing our opponent can't do anything to counter us!
Our opponent played it last turn, so it's in their [red]*Reserve*[/red] now.
Our opponent was out of mana, so they were forced to pass.
Our opponent's hero, *Sigismar,* has one such ability![/green]
Our totals of *1/3/2* would be matched against their *2/2/2.*
Pass the turn and end your Afternoon
Plants you control other than me gain 1 boost.
Play a card from your hand or Reserve
Play her into our Hero Expedition!*
Players will take turns, back and forth, until they both pass.
Playing Spy Craft ended our turn.
Pushing back the Tumult sometimes prevents other Alterers from materializing their Eidolons. Regrettable, but necessary.
fr_FR: Repousser le Tumulte empêche parfois d'autres Altérateurs de matérialiser leurs Eidolons. Un mal nécessaire.
es_ES: A veces, mantener a raya el Tumulto impide que otros Alteradores materialicen sus eidolones. Una pena, pero es necesario.
it_IT: A volte frenare il Tumulto impedisce agli altri alterer di far materializzare i loro eidolon. Spiacevole, ma necessario.
de_DE: Das Eindämmen des Tumults hindert andere Alterer gelegentlich daran, ihre Eidolons zu materialisieren. Bedauerlich, aber notwendig.

str_to_translate: Put me in my owner's Mana zone (as an exhausted Mana Orb).
Put target Character or Permanent in its owner's Mana zone (as an exhausted Mana Orb).
fr_FR: Mettez un Personnage ou Permanent ciblé dans la zone de Mana de son Propriétaire (en tant qu'Orbe de Mana épuisé).
es_ES: Coloca un personaje o permanente objetivo en la zona de maná de su propietario (como orbe de maná agotado).
it_IT: Metti un personaggio o un permanente bersaglio nell'area del mana del suo proprietario (come una sfera di mana consumata).
de_DE: Lege einen Charakter oder eine bleibende Karte deiner Wahl in die Manazone ihres Besitzers (als erschöpfte Manakugel).

str_to_translate: Put the top #two cards# of your deck in your Mana zone (as exhausted Mana Orbs).
fr_FR: Mettez #les deux premières cartes# de votre deck dans votre zone de Mana (en tant qu'Orbes de Mana épuisés).
es_ES: Coloca las #dos primeras cartas# de tu mazo en tu zona de maná (como orbes de maná agotado).
it_IT: Metti le prime #due carte# del tuo mazzo nella tua area del mana (come sfere di mana consumate).
de_DE: Lege die obersten #zwei Karten# deines Decks in deine Manazone (als erschöpfte Manakugel).

str_to_translate: Put the top card of your deck in Reserve.
fr_FR: Mettez la première carte de votre deck en Réserve.
es_ES: Pon la primera carta de tu mazo en la reserva.
it_IT: Metti la prima carta del tuo mazzo nella Riserva.
de_DE: Lege die oberste Karte deines Decks in die Reserve.

str_to_translate: Put the top card of your deck in your Mana zone (as an exhausted Mana Orb).
Put the top two cards of your deck in your Mana zone (as exhausted Mana Orbs).
Quick actions are executed by specific cards.
Right now, it indicates *Noon* because Morning is [red]skipped[/red] for the first round!
Robots you control other than me gain 1 boost.
Roll a die. #You may discard a card from your Reserve to increase the result by 2.# Target Character gains X boosts, where X is the final result.
fr_FR: Lancez un dé. #Vous pouvez défausser une carte de votre Réserve pour augmenter le résultat de 2.# Un Personnage ciblé gagne X boosts, X étant le résultat final.
es_ES: Tira un dado. #Puedes descartar una carta de tu reserva para sumar 2 al resultado.# Un personaje objetivo gana X potenciadores, donde X equivale al resultado final.
it_IT: Lancia un dado. #Puoi scartare una carta dalla tua Riserva per aumentare il risultato di 2.# Un personaggio bersaglio ottiene X rinforzi, dove X è il risultato finale.
de_DE: Würfle einmal. #Du darfst eine Karte aus deiner Reserve ablegen, um das Ergebnis um 2 zu erhöhen.# Ein Charakter deiner Wahl erhält X Verstärkungen, wobei X das Endergebnis ist.

str_to_translate: Roll a die. I gain X boosts, where X is the result.
Roll a die. On a 4+, I gain 2 boosts. On a 1-3, I gain 1 boost.
Roll a die. On a 4+, I gain 3 boosts. On a 1-3, I gain 1 boost.
Roll a die. On a 4+, I gain <ANCHORED>. On a 1-3, I gain 3 boosts.
Roll a die. On a 4+, draw a card. On a 1-3, <RESUPPLY>.
Roll a die. Target Character gain X boosts, where X is the result.
Roll a die. Target Character gains X boosts$<BB>, where X is the result.
fr_FR: Lancez un dé. Un Personnage ciblé gagne X boosts$<BB>, X étant le résultat.
es_ES: Tira un dado. Un personaje objetivo gana X potenciadores$<BB>, donde X equivale al resultado.
it_IT: Lancia un dado. Un personaggio bersaglio ottiene X rinforzi$<BB>, dove X è il risultato.
de_DE: Würfle einmal. Ein Charakter deiner Wahl erhält X Verstärkungen, wobei X das Endergebnis ist.

str_to_translate: Roll a die. Target Character gains X boosts, where X is the result.
fr_FR: Lancez un dé. Un Personnage ciblé gagne X boosts, X étant le résultat.
es_ES: Tira un dado. Un personaje objetivo gana X potenciadores, donde X equivale al resultado.
it_IT: Lancia un dado. Un personaggio bersaglio ottiene X rinforzi, dove X è il risultato.
de_DE: Würfle einmal. Ein Charakter deiner Wahl erhält X Verstärkungen, wobei X das Endergebnis ist.

str_to_translate: Rubedo is the final stage of alchemy, where one's substance is reborn like a phoenix before returning to the world.
fr_FR: Le Rubedo est l'étape finale de l'alchimie, où la substance d'un individu renaît tel un phénix avant de retourner au monde.
es_ES: El Rubedo es la última fase de la alquimia, el momento en que una sustancia renace como el fénix antes de regresar al mundo.
it_IT: La Rubedo è la fase finale dell'alchimia, dove la sostanza rinasce come una fenice prima di fare ritorno nel mondo.
de_DE: Rubedo ist die letzte Stufe der Alchemie, in der die eigene Substanz wie ein Phönix wiedergeboren wird, bevor sie in die Welt zurückkehrt.

str_to_translate: Sacrifice a Character in my Expedition.
Selected cards will join your mana pool
Send me to Discard instead of Reserve after my effect resolves.
fr_FR: Envoyez-moi à la Défausse plutôt qu'en Réserve une fois mon effet résolu.
es_ES: Una vez resuelto mi efecto, envíame a la pila de descartes en lugar de a la reserva.
it_IT: Mandami negli Scarti invece che nella Riserva dopo che il mio effetto si risolve.
de_DE: Lege mich auf die Ablage statt in die Reserve, nachdem mein Effekt abgeklungen ist.

str_to_translate: Send to Reserve target Character with Hand Cost {3} or less.
Send to Reserve target Character with Hand Cost #{5} or less#.
fr_FR: Envoyez en Réserve un Personnage ciblé de Coût de Main #{5} ou moins#.
es_ES: Envía a la reserva un personaje objetivo con coste desde la mano de #{5} o menos#.
it_IT: Manda un personaggio bersaglio con costo dalla mano #pari o inferiore a {5}# nella Riserva.
de_DE: Schicke einen Charakter deiner Wahl mit Handkosten #{5} oder weniger# in die Reserve.

str_to_translate: Shape your own adventure, choose a faction and lead your expeditions through an ever-changing world. Be the first to discover what the universe of Altered has in store for you!
She is the soul of the forest, the patron of herbal medicine. From herbs and roots, she mixes potent potions.
fr_FR: Elle est l'âme de la forêt, la patronne de l'herboristerie. Avec herbes et racines, elle concocte de puissantes potions.
es_ES: Es el alma del bosque, la patrona de las hierbas medicinales, con las que prepara potentes pociones.
it_IT: Lei è l'anima della foresta, la patrona dell'erboristeria: da erbe e radici prepara potenti pozioni.
de_DE: Sie ist die Seele des Waldes, die Schutzherrin der Kräutermedizin. Aus Kräutern und Wurzeln mischt sie starke Tränke.

str_to_translate: She won't read the future in the stars, she'll change it herself.
fr_FR: Elle ne lira pas l'avenir dans les étoiles, elle changera elle-même sa destinée.
es_ES: No lee el futuro en las estrellas: elige cuál será.
it_IT: Non leggerà il futuro nelle stelle; lo cambierà lei stessa.
de_DE: Sie wird die Zukunft nicht in den Sternen lesen – sie wird sie persönlich verändern.

str_to_translate: She'll be followed long after she's gone.
fr_FR: Elle continuera d'inspirer les foules bien après son départ.
es_ES: La seguirán mucho después de que se haya marchado.
it_IT: Continuerà a essere di ispirazione per molto tempo dopo la sua morte.
de_DE: Man wird ihr noch lange, nachdem sie von uns gegangen ist, folgen.

str_to_translate: Sigismar's Noon ability allowed him to place a *1/1/1* token in his [red]*Hero Expedition.*[/red]
Since our opponent does *NOT* meet that condition, they can't move!
Since our opponent had no more mana with which to play cards, they had to *Pass.* That means they have to [red]skip[/red] all their turns for the remainder of the afternoon.
Since our opponent played a card, their turn ended, so now it's our turn.
Since we have *more* than our opponent in *at least 1* of the skills, our token gets to move!
Slow and steady wins the race.
fr_FR: Rien ne sert de courir, il faut partir à point.
it_IT: Chi va piano, va sano e va lontano.
de_DE: In der Ruhe liegt die Kraft.

str_to_translate: Small stature, big heart, immense adventures.
fr_FR: Petite taille, grand cœur, aventures infinies.
es_ES: Pequeño de estatura, grande de corazón, enorme espíritu aventurero.
it_IT: Statura piccola, cuore grande, avventure immense!
de_DE: Kleine Statur, großes Herz, riesige Abenteuer.

str_to_translate: So far behind, and still so much to learn!
fr_FR: En retard, et encore tant de choses à apprendre !
es_ES: ¡Lo que me queda por aprender y lo atrasado que voy!
it_IT: Così indietro e con così tanto ancora da imparare!
de_DE: So weit zurück, und noch so viel zu lernen!

str_to_translate: So, if we want to advance from here, we'll have to beat the opponent in either ⛰️ or 💧 tomorrow.
Some - like the Studious Disciple - have special abilities that can only be used while in Reserve.
Some lessons stick better than others.
fr_FR: Certaines leçons collent plus à la peau que d'autres.
es_ES: Una lección de la que es difícil olvidarse.
it_IT: Alcune lezioni rimangono più impresse di altre.
de_DE: Manche Lektionen bleiben besser im Gedächtnis haften als andere.

str_to_translate: Some say the harvesters are the caretakers of the world-trees.
fr_FR: Certains disent que les vendangeurs sont les jardiniers des arbres-mondes.
es_ES: Hay quienes dicen que los cosechadores son los cuidadores de los árboles del mundo.
it_IT: Qualcuno dice che i mietitori sono i custodi degli alberi del mondo.
de_DE: Manche behaupten, die Spindelsammler seien die Hüter der Weltenbäume.

str_to_translate: Spotting a martengale is always a good omen.
fr_FR: Voir passer une martengale est toujours un bon présage.
es_ES: Ver a un martengale siempre es un buen presagio.
it_IT: Avvistare una martingala è sempre di buon auspicio.
de_DE: Der Anblick eines Martengale ist immer ein gutes Omen.

str_to_translate: Still, we made the right decision.

fr_FR: L'espionne qui ne vous aimait pas.

str_to_translate: Summon your firecat Companion to seize the advantage without delay, for only the brave make history!
Take as many Quick Actions as you want.*
Take the reins of the Ordis Legion and secure victory through sheer numbers!
Target Character gains 1 boost and loses <FLEETING_CHAR>.
fr_FR: Un Personnage ciblé gagne 1 boost et perd <FLEETING_CHAR>.
es_ES: Un personaje objetivo gana 1 potenciador y pierde <FLEETING_CHAR>.
it_IT: Un personaggio bersaglio ottiene 1 rinforzo e perde <FLEETING_CHAR>.
de_DE: Ein Charakter deiner Wahl erhält 1 Verstärkung und verliert $<FLEETING_CHAR>.

str_to_translate: Target Character gains 1 boost$<BB> and loses <FLEETING_CHAR>.
fr_FR: Un Personnage ciblé gagne 1 boost$<BB> et perd <FLEETING_CHAR>.
es_ES: Un personaje objetivo gana 1 potenciador$<BB> y pierde <FLEETING_CHAR>.
it_IT: Un personaggio bersaglio ottiene 1 rinforzo$<BB> e perde <FLEETING_CHAR>.
de_DE: Ein Charakter deiner Wahl erhält 1 Verstärkung$<BB> und verliert $<FLEETING_CHAR>.
Ein Charakter deiner Wahl erhält 3 Verstärkungen$<BB>.

str_to_translate: Target Character gains 3 boosts$<BB>.  #Draw a card.#
fr_FR: Un Personnage ciblé gagne 3 boosts$<BB>.  #Piochez une carte.#
es_ES: Un personaje objetivo gana 3 potenciadores$<BB>.  #Roba una carta.#
it_IT: Un personaggio bersaglio ottiene 3 rinforzi$<BB>.  #Pesca una carta.#
de_DE: Ein Charakter deiner Wahl erhält 3 Verstärkungen$<BB>.  #Ziehe eine Karte.#

str_to_translate: Target Character gains <ASLEEP>. #You may give it 2 boosts.# (During Dusk, ignore its statistics. During Rest, it doesn't go to Reserve and it loses Asleep.)
fr_FR: Un Personnage ciblé gagne <ASLEEP>. #Vous pouvez lui faire gagner 2 boosts.# (Au Crépuscule, ignorez ses statistiques. Au Repos, il ne va pas en Réserve et il perd Endormi.)
es_ES: Un personaje objetivo gana <ASLEEP>. #Puedes darle 2 potenciadores.# (Durante el anochecer, ignora sus estadísticas. Durante el descanso, no va a la reserva y pierde sueño.)
it_IT: Un personaggio bersaglio ottiene <ASLEEP>. #Puoi conferirgli 2 rinforzi.# (Durante il crepuscolo, ignora le sue statistiche. Durante il riposo, non va nella Riserva e perde Dormiente.)
de_DE: Ein Charakter deiner Wahl erhält <ASLEEP>.  #Du darfst ihm 2 Verstärkungen geben#. (Am Abend ignoriere seine Statistiken. Während der Ruhepause geht er nicht in die Reserve und verliert Schlafend.)

str_to_translate: Target Character gains <ASLEEP>. (During Dusk, ignore its statistics. During Rest, it doesn't go to Reserve and it loses Asleep.)
fr_FR: Un Personnage ciblé gagne <ASLEEP>. (Au Crépuscule, ignorez ses statistiques. Au Repos, il ne va pas en Réserve et il perd Endormi.)
es_ES: Un personaje objetivo gana <ASLEEP>. (Durante el anochecer, ignora sus estadísticas. Durante el descanso, no va a la reserva y pierde sueño.)
it_IT: Un personaggio bersaglio ottiene <ASLEEP>. (Durante il crepuscolo, ignora le sue statistiche. Durante il riposo, non va nella Riserva e perde Dormiente.)
de_DE: Ein Charakter deiner Wahl erhält <ASLEEP>. (Am Abend ignoriere seine Statistiken. Während der Ruhepause geht er nicht in die Reserve und verliert Schlafend.)

str_to_translate: Target Character gains <FLEETING_CHAR>. (If it would be sent to Reserve, discard it instead.)
fr_FR: Un Personnage ciblé gagne <FLEETING_CHAR>. (S'il devait être envoyé en Réserve, défaussez-le à la place.)
es_ES: Un personaje objetivo gana <FLEETING_CHAR>. (Si fuese a ir a la reserva, en vez de eso, descártalo.)
it_IT: Un personaggio bersaglio ottiene <FLEETING_CHAR>. (Se sta per finire nella Riserva, scartalo invece.)
de_DE: Ein Charakter deiner Wahl erhält <FLEETING_CHAR>. (Falls er in die Reserve geschickt werden soll, lege ihn stattdessen ab.)

str_to_translate: Target Character in your other Expedition (the one I'm not in) gains 2 boosts.
Target Character other than me gains [FLEETING], [ANCHORED] or [ASLEEP].
Target Character switches Expeditions. (It leaves its Expedition and joins its controller's other Expedition.)
fr_FR: Un Personnage ciblé change d'Expédition. (Il quitte son Expédition et rejoint l'autre Expédition de son contrôleur.)
es_ES: Un personaje objetivo se traslada de expedición. (Abandona su expedición y se incorpora a la otra expedición de su controlador.)
it_IT: Un personaggio bersaglio cambia spedizione. (Lascia la sua spedizione e si unisce all'altra spedizione del suo controllore.)
de_DE: Ein Charakter deiner Wahl wechselt Expeditionen. (Er verlässt seine Expedition und schließt sich der anderen Expedition des kontrollierenden Spielers an.)

str_to_translate: Target Character switches Expeditions. (It leaves its Expedition and joins its controller's other Expedition.)  #Draw a card.#
fr_FR: Un Personnage ciblé change d'Expédition. (Il quitte son Expédition et rejoint l'autre Expédition de son contrôleur.)  #Piochez une carte.#
es_ES: Un personaje objetivo se traslada de expedición. (Abandona su expedición y se incorpora a la otra expedición de su controlador.)  #Roba una carta.#
it_IT: Un personaggio bersaglio cambia spedizione. (Lascia la sua spedizione e si unisce all'altra spedizione del suo controllore.)  #Pesca una carta.#
de_DE: Ein Charakter deiner Wahl wechselt Expeditionen. (Er verlässt seine Expedition und schließt sich der anderen Expedition des kontrollierenden Spielers an.)  #Ziehe eine Karte.#

str_to_translate: Target Character with Hand Cost {3} or less gains <ANCHORED>. (During Rest, it doesn't go to Reserve and it loses Anchored.)
fr_FR: Un Personnage ciblé de Coût de Main {3} ou moins gagne <ANCHORED>. (Au Repos, il ne va pas en Réserve et il perd Ancré.)
es_ES: Un personaje objetivo con coste desde la mano de {3} o menos gana <ANCHORED>. (Durante el descanso, no va a la reserva y pierde anclaje.)
it_IT: Un personaggio bersaglio con costo dalla mano pari o inferiore a {3} ottiene <ANCHORED>. (Durante il riposo, non va nella Riserva e perde Ancorato.)
de_DE: Ein Charakter deiner Wahl mit Handkosten {3} oder weniger erhält <ANCHORED>. (Während der Ruhepause geht er nicht in die Reserve und verliert Verankert.)
